contents.README.md: Healthcare SaaS developer platform for patient records. FHIR is the clinical exchange contract. HIPAA and GDPR are explicitly in scope. The service is multi-tenant and every row carries tenant_id. Consumers use the software development kit, developer portal, API key, webhook, and rate limit contracts.
contents.src/server/routes.js: const app = express(); app.get('/patients', listPatients); app.post('/patients', addPatient);
contents.src/components/Portal.tsx: import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client'; export function Portal() { return <main>Patients</main>; }
